entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum L., the target crop for the study of LEA genes

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop whose LEA proteins are closely related to those of pearl millet

entities.name: TOBACCO
entities.description: The plant used as a host for transgenic expression of the PgLEAPC promoter

entities.name: AGROBACTERIUM TUMEFACIENS
entities.description: The bacterium used for mediated transformation of tobacco plants

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand non-biological stresses

entities.name: LEA GENES
entities.description: Late embryogenesis abundant genes that function in response to abiotic stresses

entities.name: PGLEA GENES
entities.description: A total of 21 LEA genes identified in pearl millet, classified into six groups

entities.name: PGLEA7
entities.description: A specific pearl millet LEA gene significantly expressed under high VPD and selected for functional validation

entities.name: PGLEAPC PROMOTER
entities.description: The complete 758 bp promoter of the PgLEAPC gene

entities.name: PGLPD1
entities.description: A 349 bp deletion version of the PgLEAPC promoter

entities.name: PGLPD2
entities.description: A 125 bp deletion version of the PgLEAPC promoter

entities.name: UIDA GENE
entities.description: A promoter-less reporter gene used to observe tissue-specific and stress-responsive expression

entities.name: ABRE
entities.description: A cis-acting element found in the PgLEA promoter regions

entities.name: CCAAT
entities.description: A cis-acting element found in the PgLEA promoter regions

entities.name: MYBS
entities.description: A cis-acting element found in the PgLEA promoter regions

entities.name: LTRE
entities.description: A cis-acting element found in the PgLEA promoter regions

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: General non-biological environmental stresses affecting plants

entities.name: HIGH PROGRESSIVE VAPOR PRESSURE DEFICIT
entities.description: A specific abiotic stress condition (VPD) under which PgLEA7 is significantly expressed

entities.name: SALT STRESS
entities.description: A specific abiotic stress that induces high uidA expression in PgLEAPC transgenics

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: A specific abiotic stress that induces high uidA expression in PgLEAPC transgenics

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: A specific abiotic stress that induces high uidA expression in PgLEAPC transgenics

entities.name: COLD STRESS
entities.description: A specific abiotic stress that induces high uidA expression in PgLEAPC transgenics

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to determine the relationship between PgLEA proteins and sorghum LEA proteins

entities.name: IN SILICO ANALYSIS
entities.description: Computational analysis used to identify cis-acting elements in promoter regions

entities.name: AGROBACTERIUM TUMEFACIENS-MEDIATED TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: The process of introducing expression vectors into tobacco plants

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL VALIDATION
entities.description: The process of testing the function of the PgLEA7 gene

entities.name: CIS-ACTING ELEMENTS
entities.description: DNA sequences in promoter regions that regulate gene expression

entities.name: PROMOTER REGIONS
entities.description: Regions of DNA that initiate transcription of a particular gene

entities.description: The portions of the PgLEA genes that are translated into proteins
